fields.description:
## Description

**What**: Create .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh — a project-local pre-commit hook that scans staged files under plugins/dso/ for the string plugins/dso and blocks the commit unconditionally. No suppression mechanism, no annotation bypass. Also relocate plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf from plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/ to .claude/hooks/pre-commit/ and update all references.
**Why**: Without enforcement, the zero-occurrence state achieved by S1-S3 can regress on any commit.
**Scope**:
- IN: .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh (new); tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref.sh (new); relocate plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf; update check-plugin-boundary.sh references; fix S1 verification test grep -v bypass; delete S1 migration script from plugins/dso/; final zero-occurrence verification
- OUT: The hook itself lives in .claude/hooks/ (not plugins/dso/) so it may reference plugins/dso in its grep pattern

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a commit staging a file under plugins/dso/ containing plugins/dso is blocked by the hook with an actionable error message — no suppression, no annotation pass-through
- When this story is complete, grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches (absolute zero — no annotated lines, no exceptions)
- When this story is complete, plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf lives at .claude/hooks/pre-commit/ with all references updated
- When this story is complete, S1 verification test (test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh) has no grep -v plugin-self-ref-ok bypass
- When this story is complete, migrate_comment_refs.py is deleted from plugins/dso/scripts/
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Test blocking case only — there is no pass-through case since there is no suppression mechanism
- [Ordering] S1 migration script and S2/S3 migration scripts must be deleted before this hook activates
